videos.headline: Quinn Ewers shines in win over Kansas
videos.description: Quinn Ewers rushes for two touchdowns and throws for another, leading Texas to a big win over Kansas.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Quinn Ewers shines in win over Kansas) 2023/09/30 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers scrambles up the middle for 30-yard TD
videos.description: Quinn Ewers gets Texas on the board as he tucks it and scrambles for a 30-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers scrambles up the middle for 30-yard TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kansas recovers their own fumble for a TD
videos.description: Jason Bean keeps it and gets a big gain, he then would fumble but Daniel Hishaw Jr. picks it up and runs it in for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kansas recovers their own fumble for a TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' Jonathon Brooks breaks off 67-yard run
videos.description: Texas gets into Kansas' red one as Jonathon Brooks breaks through the hole for a 67-yard gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas' Jonathan Brooks breaks off 67-yard run) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers throws his first pick of the season
videos.description: Texas comes away with nothing at the end of the first half as Quinn Ewers throws a pick to Cornell Wheeler.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers throws his first pick of the season) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: See ya! Jonathon Brooks goes 64 yards for a TD
videos.description: Texas goes up 20-7 as Jonathan Brooks breaks through the hole for a 64-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (See ya! Jonathon Brooks goes 64 yards for a TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jason Bean finds Trevor Wilson for a 58-yard Kansas TD
videos.description: Kansas gets back in the game as Jason Bean launches one to Trevor Wilson for a 58-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jason Bean finds Trevor Wilson for a 58-yard Kansas TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Disaster in the Kansas backfield leads to a Texas takeaway
videos.description: On fourth down, Kansas' quarterback and running back aren't on the same page leading to a fumble.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Disaster in the Kansas backfield leads to a Texas takeaway) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jonathon Brooks' 2nd TD puts Texas up two possessions
videos.description: Jonathon Brooks scores from short yardage to put Texas up 12 in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jonathon Brooks' 2nd TD puts Texas up two possessions) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers rips one to Adonai Mitchell for a Texas TD
videos.description: Texas goes up big as Quinn Ewers finds Adonai Mitchell in the corner of the end zone for an 8-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers rips one to Adonai Mitchell for a Texas TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers dives at pylon for 2nd rushing TD of day
videos.description: Quinn Ewers lays out for the pylon, giving him two rushing touchdowns on the day.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers dives at pylon for 2nd rushing TD of day) 2023/09/30 ESHEET
